Examples.Title: Get User Subscription Info
Examples.Description: Gets extended information about the users subscription
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using ElevenLabs;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Create Agent
Examples.Description: Create an agent from a config object

Examples.Title: Duplicate Agent
Examples.Description: Create a new agent by duplicating an existing one
Examples.Code:
### Duplicate Agent
# @name duplicate_agent_route
POST {{host}}/v1/convai/agents/{{agent_id}}/duplicate
xi-api-key: {{api_key}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "name": "string"
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Successful Response
# Content-Type: application/json
# 422
# Description: Validation Error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Get Agent
Examples.Description: Retrieve config for an agent
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using ElevenLabs;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Get Shareable Agent Link
Examples.Description: Get the current link used to share the agent with others
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using ElevenLabs;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: List Agents
Examples.Description: Returns a list of your agents and their metadata.
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using ElevenLabs;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: List Available Llms
Examples.Description: Returns a list of available LLM models that can be used with agents, including their capabilities and any deprecation status. The response is filtered based on the data residency of the deployment and any compliance requirements (e.g. HIPAA) of the workspace subscription.
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using ElevenLabs;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: List Mcp Server Tools
Examples.Description: Retrieve all tools available for a specific MCP server configuration.
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using ElevenLabs;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Smart Search Conversation Messages
Examples.Description: Search conversation transcripts by semantic similarity to surface relevant messages based on meaning and intent, rather than exact keyword matches
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using ElevenLabs;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Text Search Conversation Messages
Examples.Description: Search through conversation transcript messages by full-text and fuzzy search
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using ElevenLabs;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Patches An Agent Settings
Examples.Description: Patches an Agent settings

Examples.Title: Creates Audio Native Enabled Project.
Examples.Description: Creates Audio Native enabled project, optionally starts conversion and returns project ID and embeddable HTML snippet.
Examples.Code:
### Creates Audio Native Enabled Project.
# @name create_audio_native_project
POST {{host}}/v1/audio-native
xi-api-key: {{api_key}}
Content-Type: multipart/form-data
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Successful Response
# Content-Type: application/json
# 422
# Description: Validation Error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Update Audio-Native Content From Url
Examples.Description: Finds an AudioNative project matching the provided URL, extracts content from the URL, updates the project content, and queues it for conversion and auto-publishing.
Examples.Code:
### Update Audio-Native Content From Url
# @name audio_native_update_content_from_url
POST {{host}}/v1/audio-native/content
xi-api-key: {{api_key}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "url": "string",
  "author": "string",
  "title": "string"
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Successful Response
# Content-Type: application/json
# 422
# Description: Validation Error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Get Dubbing
Examples.Description: Returns metadata about a dubbing project, including whether it's still in progress or not
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using ElevenLabs;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Get Dubbed File
Examples.Description: Returns dub as a streamed MP3 or MP4 file. If this dub has been edited using Dubbing Studio you need to use the resource render endpoint as this endpoint only returns the original automatic dub result.
Examples.Code:
using var client = new ElevenLabsClient(apiKey);
var response = await client.GetAsync();
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using ElevenLabs;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Get Dubbed Transcript
Examples.Description: Returns transcript for the dub as an SRT or WEBVTT file.
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using ElevenLabs;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Delete History Item
Examples.Description: Delete a history item by its ID
Examples.Code:
### Delete History Item
# @name delete_speech_history_item
DELETE {{host}}/v1/history/{{history_item_id}}
xi-api-key: {{api_key}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Successful Response
# Content-Type: application/json
# 422
# Description: Validation Error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Download History Items
Examples.Description: Download one or more history items. If one history item ID is provided, we will return a single audio file. If more than one history item IDs are provided, we will provide the history items packed into a .zip file.
Examples.Code:
### Download History Items
# @name download_speech_history_items
POST {{host}}/v1/history/download
xi-api-key: {{api_key}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json, application/zip

{
  "history_item_ids": [
    "string"
  ],
  "output_format": "string"
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: The requested audio file, or a zip file containing multiple audio files when multiple history items are requested.
# Content-Type: application/zip
# 400
# Description: Invalid request
# Content-Type: application/json
# 422
# Description: Validation Error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Get History Item
Examples.Description: Retrieves a history item.
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using ElevenLabs;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: List Generated Items
Examples.Description: Returns a list of your generated audio.
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using ElevenLabs;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Stem Separation
Examples.Description: Separate an audio file into individual stems. This endpoint might have high latency, depending on the length of the audio file.
Examples.Code:
### Stem Separation
# @name separate_song_stems
POST {{host}}/v1/music/stem-separation?output_format=mp3_44100_128
xi-api-key: {{api_key}}
Content-Type: multipart/form-data
Accept: application/json, application/zip

## Responses
# 200
# Description: ZIP archive containing separated audio stems. Each stem is provided as a separate audio file in the requested output format.
# Content-Type: application/zip
# 422
# Description: Validation Error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Upload Music
Examples.Description: Upload a music file to be later used for inpainting. Only available to enterprise clients with access to the inpainting feature. Price for uploading is the same as the one for song generation. All uploaded content gets inspected for copyright infringement. If copyrighted content is detected, half of the request cost is still charged.
Examples.Code:
### Upload Music
# @name upload_song
POST {{host}}/v1/music/upload
xi-api-key: {{api_key}}
Content-Type: multipart/form-data
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Successfully uploaded music file with optional composition plan
# Content-Type: application/json
# 422
# Description: Validation Error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Generate Composition Plan
Examples.Description: Generate a composition plan from a prompt.
Examples.Code:
### Generate Composition Plan
# @name compose_plan
POST {{host}}/v1/music/plan
xi-api-key: {{api_key}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "prompt": "string",
  "music_length_ms": 0,
  "source_composition_plan": {
    "negative_global_styles": [
      "metal",
      "hip-hop",
      "country"
    ],
    "positive_global_styles": [
      "pop",
      "rock",
      "jazz"
    ],
    "sections": [
      {
        "duration_ms": 10000,
        "lines": [
          "Verse 1 lyrics"
        ],
        "negative_local_styles": [
          "metal",
          "hip-hop",
          "country"
        ],
        "positive_local_styles": [
          "pop",
          "rock",
          "jazz"
        ],
        "section_name": "Verse 1"
      }
    ]
  },
  "model_id": "music_v1"
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Successful Response
# Content-Type: application/json
# 422
# Description: Validation Error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Add A Pronunciation Dictionary
Examples.Description: Creates a new pronunciation dictionary from a lexicon .PLS file
Examples.Code:
### Add A Pronunciation Dictionary
# @name add_from_file
POST {{host}}/v1/pronunciation-dictionaries/add-from-file
xi-api-key: {{api_key}}
Content-Type: multipart/form-data
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Successful Response
# Content-Type: application/json
# 422
# Description: Validation Error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Add A Pronunciation Dictionary
Examples.Description: Creates a new pronunciation dictionary from provided rules.
Examples.Code:
### Add A Pronunciation Dictionary
# @name add_from_rules
POST {{host}}/v1/pronunciation-dictionaries/add-from-rules
xi-api-key: {{api_key}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "rules": [
    {
      "alias": "tie-land",
      "case_sensitive": true,
      "string_to_replace": "Thailand",
      "type": "alias",
      "word_boundaries": true
    }
  ],
  "name": "string",
  "description": "string",
  "workspace_access": "admin"
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Successful Response
# Content-Type: application/json
# 422
# Description: Validation Error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Description: Get metadata for a pronunciation dictionary

PATCH {{host}}/v1/pronunciation-dictionaries/{{pronunciation_dictionary_id}}
xi-api-key: {{api_key}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

  "archived": true,
  "name": "string"
}

# 422
# Description: Validation Error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Add Rules To The Pronunciation Dictionary
Examples.Description: Add rules to the pronunciation dictionary. If a rule with the same string_to_replace already exists, it will be replaced.
Examples.Code:
### Add Rules To The Pronunciation Dictionary
# @name add_rules
POST {{host}}/v1/pronunciation-dictionaries/{{pronunciation_dictionary_id}}/add-rules
xi-api-key: {{api_key}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "rules": [
    {
      "alias": "tie-land",
      "case_sensitive": true,
      "string_to_replace": "Thailand",
      "type": "alias",
      "word_boundaries": true
    }
  ]
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Successful Response
# Content-Type: application/json
# 422
# Description: Validation Error
# Content-Type: application/json

Content-Type: application/json

# 422

Examples.Title: Set Rules On The Pronunciation Dictionary
Examples.Description: Replaces all existing rules on the pronunciation dictionary with the provided ones.
Examples.Code:
### Set Rules On The Pronunciation Dictionary
# @name set_rules
POST {{host}}/v1/pronunciation-dictionaries/{{pronunciation_dictionary_id}}/set-rules
xi-api-key: {{api_key}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "rules": [
    {
      "alias": "tie-land",
      "case_sensitive": true,
      "string_to_replace": "Thailand",
      "type": "alias",
      "word_boundaries": true
    }
  ]
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Successfully set rules on the pronunciation dictionary
# Content-Type: application/json
# 422
# Description: Validation Error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Speech To Text
Examples.Description: Transcribe an audio or video file. If webhook is set to true, the request will be processed asynchronously and results sent to configured webhooks. When use_multi_channel is true and the provided audio has multiple channels, a 'transcripts' object with separate transcripts for each channel is returned. Otherwise, returns a single transcript. The optional webhook_metadata parameter allows you to attach custom data that will be included in webhook responses for request correlation and tracking.
Examples.Code:
### Speech To Text
# @name speech_to_text
POST {{host}}/v1/speech-to-text?enable_logging=true
xi-api-key: {{api_key}}
Content-Type: multipart/form-data
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Synchronous transcription result
# Content-Type: application/json
# 202
# Description: Asynchronous request accepted
# Content-Type: application/json
# 422
# Description: Validation Error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Description: Delete a previously generated transcript by its ID.
Examples.Code:

DELETE {{host}}/v1/speech-to-text/transcripts/{{transcription_id}}
xi-api-key: {{api_key}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Delete completed successfully.
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Authentication required
# Content-Type: application/json
# 422
# Description: Validation Error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: List Studio Projects
Examples.Description: Returns a list of your Studio projects with metadata.
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using ElevenLabs;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: List Studio Project Snapshots
Examples.Description: Retrieves a list of snapshots for a Studio project.
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using ElevenLabs;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: List Chapter Snapshots
Examples.Description: Gets information about all the snapshots of a chapter. Each snapshot can be downloaded as audio. Whenever a chapter is converted a snapshot will automatically be created.
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using ElevenLabs;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Text To Dialogue With Timestamps
Examples.Description: Generate dialogue from text with precise character-level timing information for audio-text synchronization.

Examples.Title: Text To Dialogue Streaming With Timestamps
Examples.Description: Converts a list of text and voice ID pairs into speech (dialogue) and returns a stream of JSON blobs containing audio as a base64 encoded string and timestamps

Examples.Title: Text To Speech With Timestamps
Examples.Description: Generate speech from text with precise character-level timing information for audio-text synchronization.
Examples.Code:
### Text To Speech With Timestamps
# @name text_to_speech_full_with_timestamps
POST {{host}}/v1/text-to-speech/{{voice_id}}/with-timestamps?enable_logging=true&optimize_streaming_latency={{optimize_streaming_latency}}&output_format=mp3_44100_128
xi-api-key: {{api_key}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "text": "string",
  "model_id": "eleven_multilingual_v2",
  "language_code": "string",
  "voice_settings": {
    "similarity_boost": 1.0,
    "speed": 1.0,
    "stability": 1.0,
    "style": 0.0,
    "use_speaker_boost": true
  },
  "pronunciation_dictionary_locators": [
    {
      "pronunciation_dictionary_id": "string",
      "version_id": "string"
    }
  ],
  "seed": 0,
  "previous_text": "string",
  "next_text": "string",
  "previous_request_ids": [
    "string"
  ],
  "next_request_ids": [
    "string"
  ],
  "use_pvc_as_ivc": false,
  "apply_text_normalization": "auto",
  "apply_language_text_normalization": false
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Successful Response
# Content-Type: application/json
# 422
# Description: Validation Error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Text To Speech Streaming With Timestamps
Examples.Description: Converts text into speech using a voice of your choice and returns a stream of JSONs containing audio as a base64 encoded string together with information on when which character was spoken.
Examples.Code:
### Text To Speech Streaming With Timestamps
# @name text_to_speech_stream_with_timestamps
POST {{host}}/v1/text-to-speech/{{voice_id}}/stream/with-timestamps?enable_logging=true&optimize_streaming_latency={{optimize_streaming_latency}}&output_format=mp3_44100_128
xi-api-key: {{api_key}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "text": "string",
  "model_id": "eleven_multilingual_v2",
  "language_code": "string",
  "voice_settings": {
    "similarity_boost": 1.0,
    "speed": 1.0,
    "stability": 1.0,
    "style": 0.0,
    "use_speaker_boost": true
  },
  "pronunciation_dictionary_locators": [
    {
      "pronunciation_dictionary_id": "string",
      "version_id": "string"
    }
  ],
  "seed": 0,
  "previous_text": "string",
  "next_text": "string",
  "previous_request_ids": [
    "string"
  ],
  "next_request_ids": [
    "string"
  ],
  "use_pvc_as_ivc": false,
  "apply_text_normalization": "auto",
  "apply_language_text_normalization": false
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Stream of transcription chunks
# Content-Type: application/json
# 422
# Description: Validation Error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Create A New Voice From Voice Preview
Examples.Description: Create a voice from previously generated voice preview. This endpoint should be called after you fetched a generated_voice_id using POST /v1/text-to-voice/design or POST /v1/text-to-voice/:voice_id/remix.
Examples.Code:
### Create A New Voice From Voice Preview
# @name create_voice
POST {{host}}/v1/text-to-voice
xi-api-key: {{api_key}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "voice_name": "string",
  "voice_description": "string",
  "generated_voice_id": "string",
  "labels": {},
  "played_not_selected_voice_ids": [
    "string"
  ]
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Successful Response
# Content-Type: application/json
# 422
# Description: Validation Error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Get Characters Usage Metrics
Examples.Description: Returns the usage metrics for the current user or the entire workspace they are part of. The response provides a time axis based on the specified aggregation interval (default: day), with usage values for each interval along that axis. Usage is broken down by the selected breakdown type. For example, breakdown type "voice" will return the usage of each voice for each interval along the time axis.
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using ElevenLabs;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Get User Info
Examples.Description: Gets information about the user
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using ElevenLabs;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Add Member To User Group
Examples.Description: Adds a member of your workspace to the specified group. Requires `group_members_manage` permission.
Examples.Code:

xi-api-key: {{api_key}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "email": "string"
}

# Description: Successful Response
# Content-Type: application/json
# 422
# Description: Validation Error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Invite User
Examples.Description: Sends an email invitation to join your workspace to the provided email. If the user doesn't have an account they will be prompted to create one. If the user accepts this invite they will be added as a user to your workspace and your subscription using one of your seats. This endpoint may only be called by workspace members with the WORKSPACE_MEMBERS_INVITE permission. If the user is already in the workspace a 400 error will be returned.
Examples.Code:
### Invite User
# @name invite_user
POST {{host}}/v1/workspace/invites/add
xi-api-key: {{api_key}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "email": "string",
  "workspace_permission": "string",
  "seat_type": "workspace_admin",
  "group_ids": [
    "string"
  ]
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Successful Response
# Content-Type: application/json
# 422
# Description: Validation Error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Invite Multiple Users
Examples.Description: Sends email invitations to join your workspace to the provided emails. Requires all email addresses to be part of a verified domain. If the users don't have an account they will be prompted to create one. If the users accept these invites they will be added as users to your workspace and your subscription using one of your seats. This endpoint may only be called by workspace members with the WORKSPACE_MEMBERS_INVITE permission.
Examples.Code:
### Invite Multiple Users
# @name invite_users_bulk
POST {{host}}/v1/workspace/invites/add-bulk
xi-api-key: {{api_key}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "emails": [
    "string"
  ],
  "seat_type": "workspace_admin",
  "group_ids": [
    "string"
  ]
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Successful Response
# Content-Type: application/json
# 422
# Description: Validation Error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Delete Existing Invitation
Examples.Description: Invalidates an existing email invitation. The invitation will still show up in the inbox it has been delivered to, but activating it to join the workspace won't work. This endpoint may only be called by workspace members with the WORKSPACE_MEMBERS_INVITE permission.
Examples.Code:
### Delete Existing Invitation
# @name delete_invite
DELETE {{host}}/v1/workspace/invites
xi-api-key: {{api_key}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "email": "string"
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Successful Response
# Content-Type: application/json
# 422
# Description: Validation Error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Update Member
Examples.Description: Updates attributes of a workspace member. Apart from the email identifier, all parameters will remain unchanged unless specified. This endpoint may only be called by workspace administrators.
Examples.Code:
### Update Member
# @name update_workspace_member
POST {{host}}/v1/workspace/members
xi-api-key: {{api_key}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "email": "string",
  "is_locked": true,
  "workspace_role": "workspace_admin",
  "workspace_seat_type": "workspace_admin"
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Successful Response
# Content-Type: application/json
# 422
# Description: Validation Error
# Content-Type: application/json
